settings.email_subject: New Contact Form Submission - Sicon Art
settings.success_message: Thank you! Your message has been sent. We will get back to you within 24-48 hours.

settings.editor: We ship worldwide from Dongguan, China. Standard shipping typically takes 10-18 business days. Express shipping options are available at checkout for faster delivery.

settings.title: Can I request a custom brush?

settings.editor: Absolutely! We love working with artists on custom orders. Select 'Custom Order Request' in the contact form above and describe what you are looking for. We will discuss options, materials, and pricing with you.

Yes! We offer special pricing for art supply retailers, studios, and educational institutions. Select 'Wholesale / Bulk Orders' in the form and let us know your requirements. Minimum order quantities may apply.

We want you to love your brushes. If you are not completely satisfied, you can return unused items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund. Please contact us with your order number and we will guide you through the process.
Sicon Art is based in Dongguan, Guangdong Province, China - one of the historic centers of traditional Chinese brush craftsmanship.
Discover handcrafted brushes born from a thousand-year tradition, designed for the modern artist.
